message:
bd-3oaig.13: add auto-run perf sweep mode (size/complexity loop)

Add a togglable performance sweep that automatically iterates through
7 node-count steps (6→200), generating parametric flowcharts at each
step and recording parse/layout/render timings plus quality metrics.

- Add SweepState state machine (running/step/results/seed)
- Add SweepResult struct with timing + quality fields and summary()
- 'S' key toggles sweep start/stop; auto-resets on re-trigger
- Sweep advances in tick() with configurable delay (3 ticks)
- run_sweep_step() generates, parses, layouts, renders at each size
- JSONL telemetry emission per step (mega_sweep_step event)
- Sweep progress and last 3 results shown in side panel
- Status log entries for start/step/stop/done
- 9 tests: state machine, toggle, reset, determinism, completion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
